zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave於1285年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福時，他的父親John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave29歲，母親Christian Plessis29歲。他於1316年之後與Alice FitzAlan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年12月12日之前，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave于1285年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福时，他的父亲John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave29岁，母亲Christian Plessis29岁。他于1316年之后与Alice FitzAlan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年12月12日之前，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave was born in 1285, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, was 29 and his mother, Christian Plessis, was 29. He married Alice FitzAlan after 1316. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 12 December 1325, and was buried in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave est né en 1285, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Christian Plessis, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice FitzAlan après 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 12 décembre 1325, et a été enterré à Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave 1285 in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave 29 und seine Mutter Christian Plessis 29. Er hat nach 1316 Alice FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 12. Dezember 1325 und wurde in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave è nato il nel 1285 nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Christian Plessis, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice FitzAlan dopo il 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 12 dicembre 1325, e fu sepolto a Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.Segrave, Leicester, England: イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブ
ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segraveが1285年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで生まれた時，父John Segrave 2nd Baron Segraveは29歳，母Christian Plessisは29歳であった。1316年以後にAlice FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年12月12日以前に死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャコンベチャコンベ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave(이)가 1285년 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Plessis(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1316년 이후 Alice FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 12월 12일 이전 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 차코브 차코브 플리오리에 묻혔다.

mn.Segrave, Leicester, England: Segrave, Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave nasceu em 1285, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Christian Plessis, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice FitzAlan após 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 12 de dezembro de 1325, e foi sepultado em Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave родился в 1285 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Plessis, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice FitzAlan после 1316 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 12 декабрь 1325 г. и был похоронен в местности чакомб приори, чакомб, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen de Segrave 3rd Baron Segrave nació en 1285, en Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Christian Plessis, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice FitzAlan después de 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 12 de diciembre de 1325, y fue sepultado en Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
